title: Creamy Norwegian Chwinamul Casserole
description: A hearty casserole recipe that combines the flavors of Norway with the unique taste of chwinamul. This creamy dish is perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: Cook the chwinamul according to package instructions and set aside.
Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk to combine. Cook for 1 minute.
Slowly pour in the heavy cream, whisking constantly. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and stir in the cheddar cheese until melted.
Add the cooked chwinamul, salt, and pepper to the cream sauce. Stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, crush the norwegian crema crackers.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of crushed crackers.
Pour half of the cream sauce over the crackers. Repeat the layers.
Top the casserole with additional grated cheese and crushed crackers.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
